description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/rilis/docker-ci:ci-latest with three stages: test, stats, and docs. In the stats stage add a clang-format job that runs `find * -iname '*.hpp' -o -iname '*.cpp' | xargs clang-format -i -style=file`, `git status --porcelain > ../status.log`, `git diff`, and `test ! -s ../status.log`. Also in stats add a coverage job that runs `hell --install -r "=" -r "RILI_PROMISE_TESTS=ON" -r "RILI_PROMISE_COVERAGE=ON" -i "CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11" -G "Ninja"`, `mkdir build`, `cd build`, `cmake ../ -G"Ninja" -DRILI_PROMISE_TESTS=ON -DRILI_PROMISE_COVERAGE=ON -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../.hell/install -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11`, `ninja install`, `./rili-promise_tests`, `cd ..`, `lcov --directory ./build/ --capture --output-file coverage.info`, `lcov --remove coverage.info '/usr/include/*' '*/tests/*' '*/.hell/*' -o coverage.info`, `lcov --list coverage.info`, and a cpplint job that runs `find * -iname '*.cpp' -o -iname '*.hpp' | xargs cpplint.py --linelength=120 --extensions=hpp,cpp --filter=-legal/copyright,-build/include_order,-build/c++11,+build/c++14,-runtime/references`. Add a helgrind job in stats that installs with `RILI_PROMISE_TESTS_WITH_VALGRIND=ON`, builds in Debug mode, and runs `valgrind --tool=helgrind --error-exitcode=123 --sim-hints=no-nptl-pthread-stackcache ./rili-promise_tests`, and a valgrind job that runs `valgrind --leak-check=full --show-leak-kinds=all --error-exitcode=123 ./rili-promise_tests`. In the test stage add a test job that installs, builds, and runs `./rili-promise_tests`; in the docs stage add a doxygen job that runs `doxygen Doxyfile` and publishes the `doxygen/html` directory as an artifact that expires in one week.
